- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-5-1-15-holy-magic-and-the-priest-skill` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0022-0045` [method, function, identity, attribute] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `skill, called, priest, for` statement `The skill for using holy magic is called the _priest skill_ , and those who have the priest skill are called _priests_ .`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0022-0048` [method, provenance, function, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.5` terms `magic, followers, these, wicked` statement `Because of their anti-social nature, the followers of these wicked gods tend to be abhorred, and the magic used by the followers of these wicked gods is called...`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0022-0041` [function, definition] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.25` terms `runes, called, holy, prayers` statement `Runes called holy prayers were created during the ancient kingdom period as a means to give words to this and cause miracles.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0022-0057` [limitation, relationship, requirement] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.5` terms `those, priest, skill, must` statement `Those with the priest skill must choose only _one_ god to worship.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0022-0036` [method, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.25` terms `holy, prayers, runes, used` statement `**Holy prayers** are runes used to contact the great beings, the _gods_ , and use that power as a source to perform various miracles.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.96-98` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.96-98` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-5-1-15-holy-magic-and-the-priest-skill.md`

- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-8-1-experience-points` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0030-0001` [identity, attribute] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `experience, points, given, characters` statement `**Experience points** are points given to characters as an indicator of how much experience they have gained as a result of their adventures.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0030-0002` [method, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `character, growth, done, using` statement `**Character growth** is done using these experience points.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0030-0020` [temporal, quantitative, function] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `experience, points, his, gains` statement `If he gains 5000 experience points again on his next adventure, he can now use his 5500 experience points to advance.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0030-0065` [provenance, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `points, experience, reduction, levels` statement `The reduction on the _2 levels_ row is _500 points_ , so the experience points spent are _1000_ points (experience points originally`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0030-0009` [temporal, quantitative] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `adventurer, ducard, gains, experience` statement `The adventurer Ducard II gains 5000 experience points as a result of his adventure.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.130-135` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.130-135` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-8-1-experience-points.md`

- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-11-3-dragon-roar-magic` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0035-0001` [method, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `there, restrictions, using, dragon` statement `There are no restrictions when using dragon roar magic spells.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0035-0003` [identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `magic, you, even, silence` statement `Even if _Silence_ or _Mute_ spirit magic is cast on you, you can still use dragon roar magic!`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0035-0014` [mechanism] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `repeated, training, users, dragon` statement `Through repeated training, users of dragon roar magic can master the physical, mental, and magical transcendental abilities of dragons.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0035-0011` [limitation, attribute] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.333` terms `those, who, believe, dragons` statement `Those who believe in dragons have only one goal, _to be reborn as a dragon_ .`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0035-0008` [provenance, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `1.0` terms `among, said, there, users` statement `It is said that there are users of dragon roar magic among uncivilized savage tribes and among the greater species of lizardmen, an intelligent race born from the...` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.149-153` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.149-153` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-11-3-dragon-roar-magic.md`
- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-11-5-asking-npcs-to-use-magic` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0036-0013` [ordinary-modality, provenance, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.333` terms `some, cases, adventurers, may` statement `In some cases, adventurers may need to rely on NPCs to save them from situations that are beyond their control.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0036-0014` [ordinary-modality, method, attribute] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `you, cast, may, want` statement `You may want to have a _Remove Curse_ cast on you when you're cursed, a _Resurrection_ cast when someone dies, or have a magical item appraised using _Analyze...`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0036-0015` [identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `not, they, course, these` statement `Of course, these services are not always available, and when they are, they are not free.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.154-158` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.154-158` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-11-5-asking-npcs-to-use-magic.md`
- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-12-2-rules-for-poison-illness-and-infection-part-1` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0037-0025` [identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.333` terms `due, one, poison, other` statement `One is due to **poison** and the other is due to **illness** .`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0037-0022` [definition, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.167` terms `sword, world, rpg, illness` statement `In _Sword World RPG_ , illness is defined as a state in which the balance of spirit power within the body is disrupted.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0037-0030` [function, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.167` terms `however, poison, itself, cleared` statement `However, if the poison itself is cleared away, the spirit power within the body will naturally return to a balanced state and restore health.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0037-0042` [method, attribute] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.167` terms `magic, poisons, entered, body` statement `Poisons that have entered the body can be cleared using specific antidotes (if any), the holy magic _Cure Poison_ or _Refresh_ , or the spirit magic _Restore Health_...`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0037-0045` [provenance] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.167` terms `they, even, you, detoxify` statement `Even if you detoxify someone _after_ they die from poison, they will _not_ come back to life.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.159-167` in every bullet_text; include one uncertainty term `unknown`; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.159-167` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-12-2-rules-for-poison-illness-and-infection-part-1.md`

- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-14-1-treasure-and-rewards-in-sword-world` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0058-0010` [ordinary-modality, limitation] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `not, however, unlike, normal` statement `However, unlike normal treasures, it’s not possible to appraise these goods unless you take them to a specialty shop, so they will likely not be purchased.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0058-0011` [provenance, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `some, larger, towns, there` statement `In some larger towns, there are shops that buy and sell these treasures from the ancient kingdom.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0058-0006` [unlabeled] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.25` terms `course, ancient, kingdom, was` statement `Of course, the ancient kingdom was a land where magic developed, so you’ll also find weapons, armor, treasure,`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0058-0001` [unlabeled] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.25` terms `think, adventurers, alecrast, basically` statement `Think of the adventurers of Alecrast as basically on an adventure to search for treasure lying untouched in the ruins of the ancient kingdom.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.241-242` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.241-242` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-14-1-treasure-and-rewards-in-sword-world.md`
- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-14-4-magical-item-list-part-1` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0059-0003` [method] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `treasure, skill, these, items` statement `These items can be discerned as treasure and their specific value can be determined by using the thief skill and sage skill’s _treasure appraisal_ ability.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0059-0005` [relationship, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `these, include, crowns, rings` statement `These include crowns, rings, brooches, earrings, necklaces, bracelets, etc., and other accessories that are made with gems or precious metals.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0059-0004` [provenance, definition] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `refers, wares, handicrafts, etc` statement `This refers to wares and handicrafts, etc., made from gems and precious metals.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256` in every bullet_text; include one uncertainty term `unknown`; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-14-4-magical-item-list-part-1.md`
- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-14-4-magical-item-list-part-2` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0060-0058` [identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.25` terms `effect, continues, long, item` statement `The effect continues as long as the item is worn.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0060-0055` [unlabeled] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.25` terms `effect, item, activates, wearer` statement `The effect of this item activates when the wearer directly looks at their target.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0060-0059` [evidence, function, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `they, once, affected, target` statement `Once affected, the target will not change their beliefs no matter how they are persuaded or what evidence they are shown.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256` in every bullet_text; include one uncertainty term `unknown`; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.242-256` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-14-4-magical-item-list-part-2.md`

- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-16-1-combat-in-which-monsters-roll-dice` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0062-0012` [provenance, relationship, procedure, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.4` terms `you, see, way, dice` statement `As you can see from the way the dice are rolled, this is the process for a success roll with _monster's attack points -7_ as the _difficulty_ .`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0062-0020` [relationship, procedure, identity] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.2` terms `previous, section, process, for` statement `As in the previous section, this is the process for a success roll with _monster's evasion points -7_ as the _difficulty_ .`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0062-0022` [ordinary-modality, requirement] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.4` terms `please, remember, game, master` statement `Please remember that the game master should be considered _first_ to roll the dice.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0062-0004` [unlabeled] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.2` terms `you, rolling, dice, yourself` statement `By rolling the dice yourself, you can feel like you’re playing the game.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0062-0003` [ordinary-modality] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.4` terms `however, some, game, masters` statement `However, some game masters may also want to roll the dice.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.261-264` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.261-264` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-16-1-combat-in-which-monsters-roll-dice.md`
- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-16-5-combat-options` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0063-0191` [attribute] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.5` terms `has, character, weapons, both` statement `If a character has weapons in both hands, he or she has three options for attacking.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0063-0193` [quantitative, relationship] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `attack, weapon, your, opposite` statement `**Attack with the weapon in your opposite hand** = -2 penalty to attack power.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0063-0194` [relationship] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `penalty, attack, hand, time` statement `**time** = _-2_ penalty to attack with _dominant_ hand, _-4_ penalty to attack with _opposite_ hand.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.264-268` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.264-268` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-16-5-combat-options.md`
- `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-16-7-throwing-multiple-darts-or-daggers` | plan_pages action `enrich` | PagePlan action `enrich-existing` | PageKind `source` | ResolvedPageBodyContract `source-summary` | SourceSummaryPlan selected claims (use claim_id only in covered_source_claims): claim_id `source-claim-unit-0064-0016` [ordinary-modality] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.75` terms `possible, throw, multiple, darts` statement `It’s possible to throw **multiple** darts or daggers at once.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0064-0018` [requirement, attribute] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `same, all, objects, thrown` statement `All objects thrown at the same time must have the _same weight_ (required strength).`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0064-0022` [unlabeled] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.25` terms `you, cannot, choose, multiple` statement `You _cannot_ choose _multiple_ targets.`; claim_id `source-claim-unit-0064-0021` [worked-example, quantitative] eligibility `eligible` centrality `0.0` terms `for, example, you, throw` statement `For example, if you throw _three_ at the same time, that’ll incur a -3 penalty to your attack power for each hit check.` | constraints: put citation `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.268-273` in every bullet_text; stay under 220 words | sources `raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.268-273` | path `sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-16-7-throwing-multiple-darts-or-daggers.md`
